name: Feedback incorporation with DZ-ref preservation
prompt: Evolve Unit 1 of Lengua y Literatura 5to grado. The unit has 3 DZ-ref tags: DZ-LENG-5-01, DZ-LENG-5-02, DZ-LENG-5-03. Review feedback says: (1) CRITICAL: Activity 1.2 verb 'Lista' must change to 'Argumenta' for Evaluar level alignment. (2) WARNING: Activity 2.1 needs a DUA adaptation for representation. (3) INFO: Paragraph B1-P2 uses imperative tone 'Debes'. Apply all changes and produce the evolution report.
expected_behavior: Addresses CRITICAL item first (taxonomy verb change)
Verifies all 3 DZ-ref tags remain present after changes
Produces change log with 3 entries, each citing the feedback source
Includes post-evolution validation checklist showing DZ-ref integrity preserved

name: Conflicting feedback resolution
prompt: Evolve Unit 3. Review-style recommends simplifying the vocabulary in Activity 2.3 by replacing 'hipotesis' with 'idea' (VOC-07: grade-inappropriate). Review-pedagogical requires maintaining 'hipotesis' because it is the target taxonomy term for the Analizar-level destreza. These recommendations conflict. Resolve and produce the evolution report.
expected_behavior: Identifies the conflict between style and pedagogical feedback
Resolves in favor of pedagogical alignment (taxonomy term preservation)
Applies a compromise: retains 'hipotesis' but adds inline definition
Documents the conflict resolution with pedagogical rationale
Cites evidence tag [PEDAGOGIA] for the resolution decision

name: DZ-ref tag loss detection and recovery
prompt: Evolve Unit 2. Feedback recommends removing Activity 1.3 because it is redundant. Activity 1.3 contains the only reference to DZ-LENG-5-04. If removed, DZ-LENG-5-04 becomes orphaned. Handle this situation in the evolution process.
expected_behavior: Detects that removing Activity 1.3 would orphan DZ-LENG-5-04
Does NOT silently remove the activity and lose traceability
Proposes alternative: merge Activity 1.3 content into another activity while preserving the DZ-ref tag
Or: defers the removal with documented rationale (cannot remove without coverage loss)
DZ-ref tag count remains unchanged in the evolved unit
